design_philosophy: Raw, function-forward aesthetics. Grids as foreground elements, monospaced fonts for exact data representation, and high-contrast square nodes (Bento / Terminal look) to map complex legal entities cleanly. No soft shadows; use hard edges and precise borders to project technical authority.

hierarchy.edge_label: text-[10px] font-mono font-bold tracking-wider px-1 bg-white border border-neutral-900 text-neutral-900

spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

structure.sidebar: w-80 flex-shrink-0 bg-white border-r-2 border-neutral-900 h-full flex flex-col shadow-[4px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] z-20
structure.drawer: w-96 bg-white border-l-2 border-neutral-900 shadow-[-8px_0px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] h-full absolute right-0 top-0 z-30 overflow-y-auto

spacing_and_layout.borders: Exposed grid skeleton. Inputs, buttons, and panels must have rounded-none (0px border-radius) and distinct borders.

node_tree.node_base: border-2 border-neutral-900 p-3 min-w-[220px] rounded-none cursor-pointer transition-transform duration-150 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(9,9,11,1)]

ui.button_primary: bg-neutral-900 text-white font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-4 py-2 rounded-none hover:bg-neutral-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 transition-colors
ui.input: border-2 border-neutral-300 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-neutral-900 focus:ring-0 w-full font-mono bg-white
ui.select: border-2 border-neutral-300 rounded-none px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-neutral-900 focus:ring-0 w-full font-mono bg-white
ui.badge: border border-neutral-900 bg-neutral-100 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase px-1.5 py-0.5 text-neutral-900

icons.instructions: Use sharp/regular weights. Avoid soft, rounded icons.

images.description: Minimalist architectural stairs. Use with 10% opacity in the center of the canvas when no Fund ID is selected to provide a sophisticated background.

instructions_to_main_agent: LAYOUT: Create a rigid 'Control Room' layout. Fixed Sidebar on the left (w-80) for Entity Search, Filter Panel, and Fund Selector Dropdown. Main area is the React Flow canvas filling the remaining space.

TREE LOGIC: When a user selects a Fund ID, build the hierarchy tree using React Flow. Custom nodes must display COMPANY_NAME and ENTITY_TYPE. Nodes where IS_TOP_OF_STRUCTURE=true get the 'node_top_level' styling (black bg, white text). Other nodes get 'node_child' styling.

EDGES: Edges must display EQUITIX_OWNERSHIP_DECIMAL as a percentage. Use custom React Flow edge labels (bg-white, mono font, bordered). Differentiate edge styles based on RELATION_TYPE (EQUITY=Solid Blue, GENERAL_PARTNER=Dashed Orange).

DETAIL VIEW: Clicking any node must slide out a Drawer/Panel from the right side showing all available columns from the Entity Master CSV for that entity (JURISDICTION, FUND_NAME, ASSET_NAME, SYMBOLOGIES).
STYLING: Strictly enforce rounded-none (0px border-radius) on all elements. Use hard neo-brutalist shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) to create a technical/schematic vibe.
CSS BACKGROUND: Implement a CSS grid pattern on the React Flow canvas background to reinforce the graphing tool aesthetic.
TESTING: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='fund-selector', data-testid='tree-node-123', data-testid='drawer-close').
